summary_one_line: Profile colorspace signature field must equal the FOURCC 'HLS ' (48 4c 53 20) to take the cmsSigHlsData switch arm.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The 4-byte colorspace-signature field at input offsets 0x10-0x13 must hold the exact magic literal 'HLS ' (bytes 48 4c 53 20) so that ProfileSpace == cmsSigHlsData selects the case at cmspcs.c:824; any other FOURCC routes to a different switch arm or the default.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: All five winner-resolving cmplog seeds carry 'HLS ' at offsets 0x10-0x13 (48 4c 53 20), placing the parsed signature exactly on the cmsSigHlsData value, and the blocker's true side fires (L824 W T=11).
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Every naive loser-blocking seed has 'RGB ' (52 47 42 20) at offsets 0x10-0x13 instead, so the switch lands on cmsSigRgbData and the cmsSigHlsData arm's true side is never taken (L824 L T=0).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog's I2SRandReplace reads the intercepted integer/string CMP operand for the switch dispatch, finds the seed's current 4-byte signature substring, and substitutes the logged 'HLS ' literal at that offset; naive has no CMP introspection and must blindly havoc its way onto the exact 4-byte magic, which is improbable, so naive stays blocked.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the cmsSigHlsData switch case returning PT_HLS at cmspcs.c:824, true side globally blocked.
The decisive pair is cmplog>naive with an I2S technique delta.
Winner-resolving cmplog seeds carry 'HLS ' at offsets 0x10-0x13.
Loser-blocking naive seeds carry 'RGB ' at offsets 0x10-0x13.
Offsets 0x10-0x12 differ between W (HLS) and L (RGB) with concentrated byte sets, the informative dataflow signal.
The blocker true side fires for W but never for L at line 824.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: T=11 F=19  T=0 F=62  case cmsSigHlsData:  return  PT_HLS;

evidence_trail.claim: cmplog adds I2SRandReplace which substitutes a logged CMP operand at matching input offsets, a capability naive lacks.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets

evidence_trail.claim: naive has no I2S mutation in its operator set.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: **Observed `mutation_op` in seed metadata**: any of the above. No I2S.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: Ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 2252 --role W --fuzzer cmplog --trial 2 --seed 66120690646875c5` and observed the I2S-floor signal: 2 ancestor dash rows (mutation_op = -) at depths 7 and 8 of the chain, which under the current build indicate unwrapped I2SRandReplace finds exclusive to cmplog/vpc.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness whose only roadblock is an exact 4-byte colorspace-magic equality on input bytes where naive resolves the cmsSigHlsData arm as often as cmplog within the same budget, showing the magic gate is not the divergence driver.

weakest_evidence_point: The I2S attribution rests on the dash-row floor heuristic rather than a literal I2SRandReplace name, and the two dash rows are deep ancestors (depth 7-8) not the resolving leaf itself.
